title: Vežba 31

questions.text: U kojoj rečenici would you like je korišćeno pravilno?

answers.answer: Would you like to come to the movie with us?
Would you like I make dinner tonight?
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica nije tačna. Ispravna upotreba bi bila Would you like me to make dinner tonight?

answers.answer: Would you likes a glass of water?
answers.feedback: U ovom kontekstu, like ne zahteva da se završi sa -s. Ispravan formular je Would you like a glass of water?

answers.answer: Would you like go to the park?
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica nedostaje to pre go. Ispravna rečenica bi trebalo da bude Would you like to go to the park?

description:
Would you like...? to je pristojan način da nešto poklonite ili pitate nekoga da li želi nešto.

Ako želiš da dodaš nešto, možeš ga opisati direktno nakon fraze would you like. Na primer, možeš pitati Would you like some coffee? kada želiš da pokupiš gosta kafom.

Ako predlažete da uradite nešto, kama going shopping, zapamtite da postavite to između govora i akcije. Na primer, Would you like to go shopping?

Na kraju, ako pitate nekoga da li treba da uradite nešto u njihovo ime, koristite me između would you like i to. Na primer, Would you like me to make some coffee?
